---
title: 'Benchmark: MIMIC SEM (Structural Equation Modeling)'
author: 'Kenichi Satoh'
date: "Last updated: `r format(Sys.time(), '%Y/%m/%d')`"
output:
  word_document:
    fig_width: 12
    fig_height: 12
    toc: no
---

This script reproduces Table 6 (MIMIC SEM benchmark) in
"Wild Bootstrap Inference for Non-Negative Matrix Factorization
with Random Effects" (Satoh, 2026).

```{r, dpi=300, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE, warning=FALSE, error=FALSE, message=TRUE}
library(lavaan)
data(HolzingerSwineford1939)

d <- HolzingerSwineford1939
dim(d)
index <- complete.cases(d)
d <- d[index,]
dim(d)

colnames(d)
table(d$grade)
table(d$sex)
d$age.rev <- -(d$ageyr + d$agemo / 12)
d$sex.2 <- ifelse(d$sex == 2, 1, 0)
d$school.GW <- ifelse(d$school == "Grant-White", 1, 0)
d[, c("id","sex","ageyr","agemo","school","grade")] <- NULL
colnames(d)


library(lavaan)

# lavaan expects data.frame
d_lav <- as.data.frame(d)
d_lav[] <- lapply(d_lav, function(x) as.numeric(as.character(x)))

# Indicators and covariates
yvars <- paste0("x", 1:9)
xvars <- c("age.rev", "sex.2", "school.GW")

# 3-factor model (standard assignment)
# visual: x1-x3, textual: x4-x6, speed: x7-x9
model_lr <- "
  visual  =~ x1 + x2 + x3
  textual =~ x4 + x5 + x6
  speed   =~ x7 + x8 + x9

  # Latent regression (covariates -> latent factors)
  visual  ~ a1*age.rev + s1*sex.2 + g1*school.GW
  textual ~ a2*age.rev + s2*sex.2 + g2*school.GW
  speed   ~ a3*age.rev + s3*sex.2 + g3*school.GW
"

fit_lr <- sem(
  model_lr, data = d_lav,
  meanstructure = TRUE,
  std.lv = TRUE,      # Factor variance = 1
  estimator = "MLR"   # Robust SE
)

summary(fit_lr, standardized = TRUE, fit.measures = TRUE)

# Extract covariate effects
pe <- parameterEstimates(fit_lr, standardized = FALSE)
tab_cov <- subset(pe,
                  op == "~" &
                    lhs %in% c("visual","textual","speed") &
                    rhs %in% xvars)
tab_cov <- tab_cov[, c("lhs","rhs","est","se","z","pvalue")]
tab_cov

# Wald tests: joint significance by covariate
lavTestWald(fit_lr, constraints = "
  s1 == 0
  s2 == 0
  s3 == 0
")
lavTestWald(fit_lr, constraints = "
  a1 == 0
  a2 == 0
  a3 == 0
")
lavTestWald(fit_lr, constraints = "
  g1 == 0
  g2 == 0
  g3 == 0
")

```
